subcodes.first_line: O Concourse of the chosen ones! Hasten unto the good-pleasure of God, for verily He commandeth you that which shall be as a lamp unto you in darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا معشر الاولیاء سارعوا الی مرضات الله انه یامرکم بما یکون سراجا لکم فی ظلمات
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
